Now speaking

The written briefing

World

  • World Cup — update. Argentina beat England 2–1 in the semifinal (Gordon for England; Enzo Fernández and a stoppage-time Lautaro Martínez header, both assisted by Messi) to set up a Sunday final against Spain. NPR · ESPN
  • Strait of Hormuz — update. The US blockade of Iran's ports is now in force and traffic through the strait has collapsed to a handful of vessels a day; Kuwait says Iranian fire struck an offshore oil rig. Oil stays volatile. US News · Al Jazeera
  • Science. A large study found older adults who regularly attend museums, concerts or the cinema tended to have bodies that aged roughly three years slower — an association, not proof of cause. ScienceDaily

AI & Tech

  • 2026 AI Safety Index. The Future of Life Institute's new scorecard gave no lab better than a C+; Anthropic took the top grade, OpenAI and Google DeepMind a notch back, and xAI, DeepSeek and Mistral effectively failed. buildfastwithai
  • Talent (reported). Anthropic has reportedly added Andrej Karpathy (ex-Tesla/OpenAI) and Monzo co-founder Tom Blomfield — treat the Karpathy hire as unconfirmed until official. buildfastwithai

Weather — Athens

  • Hot and dry. Low-to-mid 20s in the morning, near 34°C in the afternoon, mid-20s by evening. Strong northerly meltemi keeps it breezy but raises fire risk across Attica; no rain. Sunset ~20:47. timeanddate · easeWeather

Personal & Communication

  • Calendar connector unavailable — check it manually.
  • 2 inbox items worth attention: 1 payment/account action still outstanding, plus a heads-up on your own app's deploy and usage. Everything else is receipts, sales and routine notifications.

Gaming & Deals

  • Epic free games — new this week. Luto (first-person psychological horror) and Echo Generation: Midnight Edition (cosy turn-based RPG), together worth ~$45, are free to keep through Jul 23. Game Rant · PC Gamer

Learning

  • Word of the day — sonder: the realisation that every stranger you pass is living a life as vivid and complex as your own. "The crowded gym gave her a sudden pang of sonder."
  • AI tip: when you need output in a specific shape, don't describe it — show one example of exactly what you want. A single sample beats a paragraph of instructions.
